title: Adenocarpus aureus
taxonomy: Adenocarpus aureus is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is part of the genus Adenocarpus, which is a group of plants commonly known as golden brooms. The Fabaceae family, also known as legumes, is a large and diverse group of plants that include beans, peas, and many other species. The classification of Adenocarpus aureus is further refined into the subfamily Faboideae. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships between different plant species.
